name: [auto_patrol] SPC chat's continue OOC check
description: 檢查OOC 的SPC chart的最近2次process, 是否有2次都OOC
steps_mapping:
[{"step_id": "step1", "nl_segment": "Fetch up to 500 SPC snapshot history records for the target equipment", "python_code": "history = await execute_mcp('get_object_snapshot_history', {'targetID': equipment_id, 'objectName': 'SPC'})
history = history if isinstance(history, list) else []
data = history[-500:] if len(history) > 500 else history"}, {"step_id": "step2", "nl_segment": "Extract xbar_chart value, UCL, LCL from each record and compute OOC status by comparing value against UCL/LCL", "python_code": "def _is_xbar_ooc(r):
    xbar = r.get('charts', {}).get('xbar_chart', {})
    v, ucl, lcl = xbar.get('value'), xbar.get('ucl'), xbar.get('lcl')
    return v is not None and ucl is not None and lcl is not None and (v > ucl or v < lcl)

records = [{"index": i, "value": r.get("charts",{}).get("xbar_chart",{}).get("value"), "ucl": r.get("charts",{}).get("xbar_chart",{}).get("ucl"), "lcl": r.get("charts",{}).get("xbar_chart",{}).get("lcl"), "is_ooc": _is_xbar_ooc(r)} for i, r in enumerate(data)]"}, {"step_id": "step3", "nl_segment": "Build table records and SPC trend chart data for all retrieved records", "python_code": "spc_trend = [{"index": rec["index"], "value": rec["value"], "ucl": rec["ucl"], "lcl": rec["lcl"], "is_ooc": rec["is_ooc"]} for rec in records]"}, {"step_id": "step4", "nl_segment": "Check the most recent 5 processes for 2+ OOC occurrences and determine condition", "python_code": "recent_5 = records[-5:] if len(records) >= 5 else records
ooc_count = sum(1 for rec in recent_5 if rec["is_ooc"])
condition_met = ooc_count >= 2
_findings = {
    "condition_met": condition_met,
    "summary": f"Equipment {equipment_id}: {ooc_count}/{len(recent_5)} OOC in last 5 processes (threshold >= 2), total {len(records)} records retrieved",
    "outputs": {
        "ooc_count": ooc_count,
        "records": records,
        "spc_trend": spc_trend,
        "status": "OOC異常-最近5次超過2次OOC" if condition_met else "正常"
    },
    "impacted_lots": []
}"}]
output_schema: [{"key": "records", "type": "table", "label": "SPC 資料表 (最多500筆)", "columns": [{"key": "index", "label": "序號", "type": "int"}, {"key": "value", "label": "量測值", "type": "float"}, {"key": "ucl", "label": "UCL", "type": "float"}, {"key": "lcl", "label": "LCL", "type": "float"}, {"key": "is_ooc", "label": "OOC", "type": "bool"}]}, {"key": "spc_trend", "type": "line_chart", "label": "SPC 管制圖 (value=綠色, UCL/LCL=橙色)", "x_key": "index", "y_keys": ["value", "ucl", "lcl"], "highlight_key": "is_ooc"}, {"key": "ooc_count", "type": "scalar", "label": "最近5次 OOC 次數", "unit": "次"}, {"key": "status", "type": "badge", "label": "診斷結論"}]
